sections.paragraph:
- Original: χωρέω

- Transliteration: Choreo

- Phonetic: kho-reh'-o

- Definition:

1. to leave space (which may be filled or occupied by another), to make room, give place, yield

a. to retire

b. metaph. to betake one's self, turn one's self

2. to go forward, advance, proceed, succeed

3. to have space or room for receiving or holding something

- Origin: from G5561

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5561; to be in (give) space that is (intransitively) to pass enter or (transitively) to hold admit (literally or figuratively): - come contain go have place (can be room to) receive.
